The '''Moffship''' was a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] used by the [[Central Committee of Grand Moffs]]. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. the cruiser was used as a mobile headquarters for the committee during their attempt to usurp [[Ysanne Isard]] and replace her with [[Trioculus]] as [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Galactic Emperor]].<ref name="Mission from Mount Yoda">''[[Mission from Mount Yoda]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Mission from Mount Yoda]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Queen of the Empire]]''
*[[Prophets of the Dark Side (novel)|''Prophets of the Dark Side'']]
